questionHtml:
Two charges, +Q and −Q, are placed as shown.

What is the magnitude of the electric field strength, in descending order, at points X, Y and Z.

 

A. YXZ

B. ZXY

C. ZYX

D. YZX

meta.title: Two charges, +Q and −Q, are placed as shown. What is the magnitude of the electric field strength, in descending order, at points X, Y and Z. A. YXZ B. ZXY C. ZYX D. YZX
